rationale.R1.4: Clearly articulates the novelty compared to Formaggia & Perotto (2003) by highlighting the dual-only metric construction.
rationale.R1.7: Mentions one missing citation (Frey and Alauzet, 2005).
rationale.RX.1: All claims presented as equally confident without acknowledging uncertainty.
rationale.RX.3: Mostly within scope with a minor drift towards discussing the broader context of anisotropic adaptation.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original text.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced; minor edits are not.
